name: wikov.com
message: Wikov is a prominent engineering group based in the Czech Republic, specializing in the production of gears and gearboxes. The company has a rich history, having been active in mechanical engineering for over 130 years. It is recognized as the successor to the original gearbox manufacturer ŠKODA, with its operations centered in the same facility where ŠKODA gearboxes were historically produced.SITE: www.wikov.com Address : Port 7, Budova D Pod Dráhou 1638/7 170 00 Praha 7 Czech RepublicTEL#: +420 724 204 773ALL DATA SIZE: ≈1.5tb 1. Financial data 2. Personal employees folders and documents 3. Confidential data, NDA’s 4. R&D, Engeneering, Projects, Drawings & etc…
